hct.source: Anemia (low Hct) is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes, particularly in those with long-standing disease.

hgb.source: Anemia (low Hgb) is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes, particularly in those with long-standing disease.

mch.source: Low MCH can be seen in iron deficiency anemia, which is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes.

mchc.source: Low MCH can be seen in iron deficiency anemia, which is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes.

mcv.source: Microcytosis (low MCV) can be seen in iron deficiency anemia, which is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes.

plt.source: Thrombocytosis (high platelet count) can be associated with Type 2 Diabetes, particularly in those with chronic kidney disease.

rbc.source: Anemia (low RBC count) is a common complication of Type 2 Diabetes, particularly in those with long-standing disease.

rdw.source: Elevated RDW can indicate increased red blood cell production variability, which may be seen in early stages of Type 2 Diabetes.

wbc.source: Elevated WBC count can indicate infection or inflammation, which may be associated with Type 2 Diabetes.
